title: narcissus linnaeanus subsp. papyraceus
intro: Narcissus linnaeanus subsp. papyraceus, also known as the paper narcissus or papyraceus narcissus, is a subspecies of the flowering plant Narcissus linnaeanus, belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Narcissus linnaeanus subsp. papyraceus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and ulcers. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties.
